nodes.label: Static Site Built with Astro
nodes.rationale: The site is built as a static HTML/CSS/JS site using Astro to avoid server-side logic, making it simple to host on any web server via FTP without runtime dependencies.

nodes.label: Google Drive Image Sync (sync-drive.mjs)
nodes.rationale: Gallery and notice images are pulled from public Google Drive folders at build time, converted to WebP in multiple widths, and manifests are written to src/data/. This avoids storing large images in git.

nodes.label: CI/CD FTP Deploy Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Only changed files are uploaded on each deploy (diff-based FTP), avoiding full re-uploads and enabling fast incremental deployments.

properties.description: Flame over open book is the well-known Seventh-day Adventist Church logo; site is keila.advent.ee (Advent = Adventist)
Primary color palette is orange tones

Flame symbol is central to Adventist iconography

links.note: The icon matches the well-known Seventh-day Adventist Church flame-and-book logo design
Open book shape visible at base of icon, typical of Adventist branding
Orange/red flame shape visible in upper portion of icon

links.notes: SVG explicitly contains three circles labeled as children's heads (laste pead) and body paths (laste kehad)

SVG explicitly contains an open book element (avatud raamat) with binding strip and text lines
Three children depicted together symbolize a group children's activity or class
Open book in context of church children's event likely symbolizes Bible study or religious instruction

links.context: The SVG icon shows a stylized church building with steeple and cross in brown/terracotta color
A cross shape is formed by the second path element in the SVG, centered on the church facade
The upper portion of the main path forms a pointed steeple/tower with a finial at the top
File is named jumalateenistus1.svg meaning church service in Estonian; icon is used to represent worship events
Church building is the venue and symbol for jumalateenistus (church service/worship)
Cross is a universal Christian symbol associated with church services and worship
Terracotta brown color likely matches the site's overall color palette
SVG desc states 'minimalistlik' (minimalist) style, no keyhole or bottom bar

links.note: The image is a flat monochrome food icon used as a UI element
Pizza slice icon used to represent communal/shared meal (uhine soomine) in the context of a food-sharing or group dining activity

aria-label and title both state 'Osasaamise ikoon'; osasaamine means communion/participation in Estonian
SVG contains a subtle cross on the chalice with comment '<!-- subtle cross on chalice -->'
